$comment: Content catalog. Maps content to structural keys only (categoryKey, courseSlug). All UI/chrome labels (category names, status badges, CTAs) live in src/i18n/translations.ts — adding a language is one file, not two.
$categoryKeysComment: Display labels live at translations.ts under 'library.category.<key>'. Add a new key here AND a translation entry there.

ai-engineering.$comment: Course content (titles/descriptions/lecturer) lives here because it is per-course content metadata, similar to book-manifest.json — not platform chrome.

descriptions.he: קורס AI Engineering בהנחיית ערן סלע — מיסודות ML ועד בנייה מעשית של מערכות הסתברותיות.
descriptions.en: AI Engineering course with Eran Sela — from ML foundations to practical probabilistic system design.
descriptions.es: Curso de AI Engineering con Eran Sela — desde los fundamentos de ML hasta el diseño práctico de sistemas.
